subject: Re: Shift swap request
body: Denise, will confirm Thursday tonight after clinic. Owe me Sunday-afternoon two weeks out. - John

subject: Refill discrepancy hold - methotrexate 15mg
body: Front-desk, please hold my next methotrexate 15mg fill until I confirm the last-fill date. My log and your record show different last-fills - I want to walk in on the correct day and not double up. Will call after 4:30. - John Martin

subject: Care package holding for the weekend
body: Marcus - packing a small care box for the weekend Kayla drives down. Kitchen items plus a couple of groceries. Under threshold. Will finalize tomorrow after clinic. Love, Dad.
